FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.26sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f2327757a60>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-30T02:19:32Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-30T02:18:09Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert test_username in usernames, (
            f"Test user {test_username!r} not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

2026/04/30 02:21:01.372639012 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372647181 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372676653 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/30 02:21:01.372693770 {

2026/04/30 02:21:01.372780737 new$version <- version
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372781470 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372793390 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372794110 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372806224 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372807012 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372820512 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372822645 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372851672 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372852985 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372866443 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372867415 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372901081 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372902298 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372934285 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372935430 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372954198 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372955279 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372993393 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/04/30 02:21:01.372994587 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373018567 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373019207 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373027509 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373028049 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373038659 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373041196 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373081809 enc <- family$encoding
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373091488 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373092274 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373103892 "default"))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373104429 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373111529 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373112042 }
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373118723 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373119391 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373129108 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373129651 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373138775 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373139763 }
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373152378 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373153184 }
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373165471 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373166315 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373184723 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373185249 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373194390 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373194898 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373203716 }
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373204245 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373212069 old$family <- family
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373212597 }
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373221351 version <- old$version

2026/04/30 02:21:01.373306024 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373306693 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373320645 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373321569 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373338946 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/04/30 02:21:01.373339526 invisible()
